title: NTA NSSNET Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: NTA NSSNET Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: National Testing Agency Result 2026 Out for NSSNET 2026 entrance exam on the official website - nta.ac.in on 11th May 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the National Testing Agency NSSNET result.

content.text: National Testing Agency has officially released the NTA NSSNET Result 2026 online for candidates who appeared in the Navayug School Sarojini Nagar Entrance Test 2026. The result has been announced for admission-related entrance screening for Class 6 and Class 7 at Navayug School Sarojini Nagar, New Delhi, and students can now access their scorecards through the official login portal. National Testing Agency Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - nta.ac.in.

Candidates who appeared for the exam can check and download their NSSNET 2026 scorecard by using their application number and password through the official result login page. Students are advised to carefully verify all details mentioned on the scorecard after downloading it and contact the concerned authority in case they find any discrepancy.

National Testing Agency has released the NSSNET Result 2026 for candidates who appeared in the entrance exam for admission to Class 6 and Class 7. Students can check their scorecards online through the official portal using their application number and password. The latest result update, official website, and direct login link are given below for easy access.

rows: Navayug School Sarojini Nagar Entrance Test (NSSNET) 2026
Class 6 and Class 7 Admission Test Result

content.text: The direct link to check NTA NSSNET Result 2026 has now been activated for all eligible candidates. Students who appeared in the entrance examination can use the official portal to view and download their scorecards instantly. The result access table below includes the available official link for quick checking.

sections.heading: How to Check NTA NSSNET Result 2026

items: Visit the official website of National Testing Agency - nta.ac.in
Open the NSSNET 2026 result or scorecard login page.
Click on the result link available for NSSNET 2026.
Enter your Application Number and Password in the login window.
Submit the details to view your scorecard.
Download and save the result for future reference.
